parameters.query:
INSERT INTO telegram_ubicacion_throttle (chat_id, last_allowed_at)
VALUES ($1::bigint, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE
SET last_allowed_at = EXCLUDED.last_allowed_at
WHERE telegram_ubicacion_throttle.last_allowed_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute'
RETURNING chat_id,
  $2::double precision AS latitude,
  $3::double precision AS longitude,
  $4::bigint AS user_id,
  $5::text AS user_name,
  $6::double precision AS horizontal_accuracy,
  $7::int AS live_period,
  $8::int AS message_id,
  $9::bigint AS message_date_unix,
  $10::boolean AS es_edited_message;

parameters.text: ={{ '📍 Ubicación registrada (throttle OK) • Lat: ' + $json.latitude + ' • Lon: ' + $json.longitude + '' + ($json.user_name ? ' • Usuario: ' + $json.user_name : '') + ($json.es_edited_message ? ' Actualización en vivo' : '') }}
